user.title: Moen Smart Water Setup
user.description: Enter your Moen account credentials. This covers the Sump Pump Monitor, Flo Shutoff Valve, and leak detector pucks under one login.

data.flo_location_id: Flo location ID (optional -- only needed for shutoff valve/leak detector support; leave blank if you only have a sump pump monitor, or don't know it yet)
